title: Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs 25 Matching Service Providers ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales support building homes. Accepts donations of building materials, cabinets, doors and windows, flooring, lighting, plumbing, tools, furniture and home decor, appliances, and miscellaneous items. Pickup is available for items that do not fit in a passenger vehicle. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm Email (541) 548-1406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 464 NE 219th Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE PORTLAND DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 3969 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE TIGARD DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 9806 SW Tigard Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people donating furniture and appliances to those needing those items. Small items like blankets and hygiene items can be brought to the Family Resource Center. 3520 Frontage Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 271-9700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accept donations of new or gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bakeware, small appliances, utensils, pots, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am Pick up: Varies (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNITURE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used furniture, kitchen, household goods, and food boxes. Accepts furniture, kitchen, and household goods donations. Limited donation pick up is available. 4550 Marion Steet SE Suite C Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Furniture Distribution: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Furniture Drop Off: Friday 9am-4pm Furniture Pickup: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 754-9511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store generates revenue to support the Gospel Rescue Mission, provides work opportunities for Mission residents, accepts donations of goods from community members, and provides assistance to those in need through a clothing voucher program. 429 SE 6th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm (541) 479-9748 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH WORKS JJ'S CONSTRUCTION THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Manages a mattress recycling and repurposing program. Provides furniture and household items upcycling. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 591-8357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF GREATER HILLSBORO GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential household items, including beds and bedding, linens, furniture, clothing, diapers, hygiene products, cleaning and laundry supplies, paper goods, and work boots. Donations are accepted of the items the agency distributes, with an ongoing need for couches, kitchen tables, and queen-size or smaller beds (including mattresses, box springs, and frames). Referrals to local food pantries are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday noon-2:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9:30am-noon Email (503) 917-0205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NW FURNITURE BANK NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Launder and wash housewares donations prior to pick up. All items must be in good reuseable condition, free of pet hair, rips, and stains. All items will be inspected prior to acceptance. Pickup service available. 13503 SE Mill Plain Boulevard #114 Vancouver, WA 98684 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Pick up: Appointment required Email (360) 787-7144 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION OF CENTRAL OREGON OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION THRIFT STORE MADRAS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-cost clothing, furniture, household items, appliances, books, and videos. Accepts donations including large furniture. 1412 SW Highway 97 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Stores: Monday 9am-3pm and Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 475-6961 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION OF CENTRAL OREGON OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION THRIFT STORE REDMOND THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-cost clothing, furniture, household items, appliances, books, and videos. Accepts donations including large furniture. 3294 S Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday 9am-3pm, Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 548-5288 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY MEDFORD RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Accepts new and reclaimed building materials, furniture, and appliances in good working condition. 2233 S Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation drop off: Tuesday/Friday/Saturday 10am-4pm (541) 773-9095 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells new and used appliances, clothes, electronics, and miscellaneous household goods. Accepts donations in good working condition. 107 W Bishop Way Brownsville, OR 97327 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 466-3003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides previously used durable medical equipment, such as hospital beds, wheelchairs, walkers, crutches, canes, commodes, and toilet risers, as well as furniture and appliances. Donations are accepted. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: January-October: Tuesday noon-2pm or by appointment November-December: By appointment only Email (541) 563-3710 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE SAINT VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE THRIFT AND CONSIGNMENT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store offering donated household items, such as clothing, linens, books, and furniture, also accepts donations of similar items. Limited dontation pick up is available. 51661 Huntington Road La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations: Monday -Saturday 10am- until capacity is reached Email (541) 536-1956 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a food pantry, providing a 3 day supply of food. Also has a rotating supply of clothing, shoes, furniture, appliances, and other household goods supplied by donations. Food, clothing items, and household items accepted for donation. 100 Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Wednesday 9am-11am and 11:30am-3pm Email (541) 258-5405 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works together with Family Partnership Advocates in schools to provide information and referral for services such as OHP, SNAP, WIC, housing support, furniture support, legal help, and basic needs assistance. 9550 SW Murdock Street Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-18 or pregnant individuals Hours: By appointment only (503) 603-1585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TILLAMOOK COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY TILLAMOOK RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items. Donations are accepted and pickup is available. 4192 Highway 101 N Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-4pm, Monday/Tuesday by appointment only Email (503) 377-0204 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER FURNITURE SHARE FURNITURE SHARE GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE KLAMATH WORKS JJ'S CONSTRUCTION THRIFT STORE OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE ROGUE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE THRIFT STORE ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER TILLAMOOK COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY TILLAMOOK RESTORE
